dashboard.subtitle: Your teaching toolkit, powered by AI.

dashboard.class_limit: You can have up to 8 classes.

classes.subject: Subject

step1.title: Which class is this lesson for?
step1.subtitle: Select a class to pre-fill grade and standards, or add a new one.

step2.title: Which standards should this lesson cover?
step2.subtitle: Select one or more standards to evaluate.
step2.search_placeholder: Search by keyword or standard code...
step2.no_results: No standards found. Try a different search or grade.
step2.select_to_continue: Select at least one standard to continue

step3.title: Enter your lesson plan
step3.subtitle: Type, upload, or dictate your lesson. You can edit before continuing.
step3.type_placeholder:
Write or paste your lesson plan here...

Include your objectives, activities, materials, and any assessment you have in mind. The more detail you provide, the better the analysis.
step3.upload_success: File parsed! Review and edit below:

step5.title: Here are some ideas to strengthen your lesson
step5.subtitle: Accept, edit, or dismiss each suggestion. Add your own ideas at the bottom.
step5.add_own_placeholder: Type any additional activities, notes, or ideas you want to include...
step5.msg2: Tailoring suggestions to your grade level...

step6.title: Review your complete lesson
step6.subtitle: Make any final edits. The coverage indicator updates as you type.
step6.coverage_hint: Coverage updates automatically every 30 seconds of inactivity.

step7.title: Your lesson is ready!
step7.subtitle: Preview your formatted lesson, export to PDF, and save to your archive.
